item.dc:creator: Freddie Clayton
item.description: President Donald Trump has yet to make a decision on a deal that could extend the current ceasefire with Iran, with no announcement on Friday following a Situation Room meeting where he said he would make a “final determination.”Oil prices have dipped this week amid persistent reports that Trump and Iran could be close to sealing an agreement that has eluded the two sides for over a month

media:content.media:text: Trump Iran US
media:content.media:description: Journalists work outside of the White House in Washington, Tuesday, April 7.

item.title: Trump is stalling deal talks with ‘excessive demands,’ Iran official says

item.dc:creator: Dan De Luce
Courtney Kube
Katherine Doyle
Gordon Lubold
item.description: The F-15 fighter that was shot down over southwestern Iran last month and set off a dangerous rescue mission was probably struck by a Chinese-made shoulder-launched missile, sources say.

media:content.media:text: US Military Aircraft Activity At RAF Base In England
media:content.media:description: An F15 fighter plane on Jan. 7 above Mildenhall, England.

item.title: Iran may have used Chinese missile to shoot down U.S. fighter jet, sources say

item.dc:creator: Daniella Silva
item.description: Tensions rose at a Newark, New Jersey, immigration detention center on Saturday as a group of pro-ICE protesters faced off with demonstrators who have maintained a presence outside the facility for more than a week in support of detainees who they say are enduring inhumane conditions inside

media:content.media:text: Delaney Hall protest.
media:content.media:description: Newark police arrive outside the Delaney Hall detention center on Saturday in Newark, N.J.

media:content.media:text: Protest outside Delaney Hall detention center, in Newark.
media:content.media:description: Newark police arrive outside the Delaney Hall detention center on Saturday in Newark, N.J.

media:content.media:text: An anti-ICE protesters holds a sign opposing a line of New Jersey State Police.
media:content.media:description: Newark police arrive outside the Delaney Hall detention center on Saturday in Newark, N.J.

media:content.media:text: Delaney Hall protest.
media:content.media:description: Newark police arrive outside the Delaney Hall detention center on Saturday in Newark, N.J.

media:content.media:text: Delaney Hall protest.
media:content.media:description: Newark police arrive outside the Delaney Hall detention center on Saturday in Newark, N.J.

item.title: Dueling protests face off at New Jersey ICE detention center over detainee conditions

item.dc:creator: Alexandra Marquez
item.description: President Donald Trump is slated to speak at the opening ceremony for the Great American State Fair in June as part of the United States’ 250th-birthday celebrations in Washington

media:content.media:text: Donald Trump is visible through the window of the Presidential limousine.
media:content.media:description: President Donald Trump said he would kick off the Great American State Fair at a June 24 opening ceremony.

media:content.media:text: Young MC, left, and Morris Day both declined to participate after saying they learned the event was political in nature.
media:content.media:description: President Donald Trump said he would kick off the Great American State Fair at a June 24 opening ceremony.

item.title: Trump to hold a rally at the ‘Great America State Fair’ after several artists back out

item.dc:creator: The Associated Press
item.description: Paris Saint-Germain won back-to-back Champions League trophies by beating Arsenal on penalties in a dramatic final in Puskas Arena on Saturday

media:content.media:text: Paris Saint Germain celebrate.
media:content.media:description: Marquinhos of Paris Saint Germain lifts the trophy alongside teammates during the UEFA Champions League Final 2026 match between Paris Saint-Germain and Arsenal FC at Puskas Arena on Saturday in Budapest, Hungary.

item.title: PSG wins back-to-back Champions League titles after shootout victory against Arsenal

item.dc:creator: Freddie Clayton
Nat Sumon
item.description: Five men have now been freed after spending more than a week trapped in a flooded cave in Laos, according to rescuers, with two others still missing

media:content.media:text: Rescuers pull four from flooded cave in Laos
media:content.media:description: Rescued men are welcomed, after seven Lao nationals who had entered a cave to prospect for gold were trapped for more than a week when rising water blocked their exit, in Xaisomboun province, Laos, May 30, 2026, in this screen grab taken from social media video.

item.title: Four more men rescued from flooded cave after becoming trapped while searching for gold

item.description: On the sidelines of the Trump-Xi Summit in Beijing, NBC News' Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio to discuss China policy, the war with Iran, the future of Cuba, and more.

media:content.media:title: Extended Interview: Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio
media:content.media:description: On the sidelines of the Trump-Xi Summit in Beijing, NBC News' Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio to discuss China policy, the war with Iran, the future of Cuba, and more.

item.title: Extended Interview: Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio

item.dc:creator: The Associated Press
item.description: Paris Saint-Germain won back-to-back Champions League trophies by beating Arsenal on penalties in a dramatic final in Puskas Arena on Saturday

media:content.media:text: Paris Saint Germain celebrate.
media:content.media:description: Marquinhos of Paris Saint Germain lifts the trophy alongside teammates during the UEFA Champions League Final 2026 match between Paris Saint-Germain and Arsenal FC at Puskas Arena on Saturday in Budapest, Hungary.

item.title: PSG wins back-to-back Champions League titles after shootout victory against Arsenal

item.dc:creator: The Associated Press
item.description: Coco Gauff finally met a player in Paris who could match her court coverage in long baseline rallies

media:content.media:text: Coco Gauff holds one hand over her face on the tennis court.
media:content.media:description: Coco Gauff of the United States during her third round match against Anastasia Potapova of Austria in Paris on Saturday.

media:content.media:text: Naomi Osaka on a clay tennis court wearing a sequined outfit.
media:content.media:description: Coco Gauff of the United States during her third round match against Anastasia Potapova of Austria in Paris on Saturday.

item.title: Coco Gauff’s French Open title defense ends in 3rd-round loss

item.dc:creator: Alexandra Marquez
item.description: President Donald Trump is slated to speak at the opening ceremony for the Great American State Fair in June as part of the United States’ 250th-birthday celebrations in Washington

media:content.media:text: Donald Trump is visible through the window of the Presidential limousine.
media:content.media:description: President Donald Trump said he would kick off the Great American State Fair at a June 24 opening ceremony.

media:content.media:text: Young MC, left, and Morris Day both declined to participate after saying they learned the event was political in nature.
media:content.media:description: President Donald Trump said he would kick off the Great American State Fair at a June 24 opening ceremony.

item.title: Trump to hold a rally at the ‘Great America State Fair’ after several artists back out

item.description: Tensions rose at a Newark, New Jersey, immigration detention center on Saturday as a group of pro-ICE protesters faced off with demonstrators who have maintained a presence outside the facility for more than a week in support of detainees who they say are enduring inhumane conditions inside

item.dc:creator: The Associated Press
item.description: Three climbers on Alaska’s Mount McKinley who fell near a treacherous pass on North America’s tallest peak have died, a Latvian mountaineering group announced Friday.

media:content.media:text: Mt. McKinley.
media:content.media:description: An aerial view of Mt. McKinley in Denali National Park, Alaska.

item.title: 3 climbers who fell near treacherous pass on Alaska’s Mount McKinley are dead; 1 rescued

item.dc:creator: Maya Huter
Brian Cheung
item.description: The Wrights turned their Texas home from a solar-powered standalone into part of a Virtual Power Plant (VPP) network, which returns excess energy to the grid.

media:content.media:text: Solar panels
media:content.media:description: Americans across the country are bracing for higher utility bills and with data centers across the country threatening to sap more from the power grid, some utility companies are saying a new type of home energy system could pay you back instead.

item.title: Utility companies want to pay you to generate power for the electrical grid

item.dc:creator: The Associated Press
item.description: KABUL, Afghanistan — A truck carrying Afghan refugees returning from neighboring Pakistan overturned on a highway in eastern Afghanistan on Saturday, killing at least 22 people and injuring about 36 others, most of them women and children, officials said

media:content.media:text: AFGHANISTAN-TRANSPORT-ACCIDENT
media:content.media:description: A man carries an injured girl to a hospital for treatment after a truck carrying Afghan families overturned in Jalalabad on May 30.

item.title: Truck carrying returning refugees crashes in eastern Afghanistan, killing 22

item.dc:creator: Marta Campabadal Graus
item.description: BARCELONA, Spain — Nariola Romo, 34, and her family immigrated to Spain from Colombia, but that wasn’t their initial plan.

media:content.media:text: Spain Pushes Ahead With Plan to Tax Non-EU Home Buyers 100%
media:content.media:description: Overlooking Barcelona, Spain, on Wednesday.

media:content.media:text: (From right to left) Nariola Romo, her son Angelito, her husband Ángel, her daughter Claribel, and her father Will, on the Barcelona metro.
media:content.media:description: Overlooking Barcelona, Spain, on Wednesday.

media:content.media:text: Diadji Nguirane and his partner, Maimouna Gueye, in the living room of their home in the town of Terrassa, about 17 miles from Barcelona.
media:content.media:description: Overlooking Barcelona, Spain, on Wednesday.

item.title: Spain is legalizing half a million immigrants, a very different policy from the U.S.

item.dc:creator: Freddie Clayton
item.description: President Donald Trump has yet to make a decision on a deal that could extend the current ceasefire with Iran, with no announcement on Friday following a Situation Room meeting where he said he would make a “final determination.”Oil prices have dipped this week amid persistent reports that Trump and Iran could be close to sealing an agreement that has eluded the two sides for over a month

media:content.media:text: Trump Iran US
media:content.media:description: Journalists work outside of the White House in Washington, Tuesday, April 7.

item.title: Trump is stalling deal talks with ‘excessive demands,’ Iran official says

item.dc:creator: Yuliya Talmazan
item.description: The man known as Europe’s last dictator may soon be coming in from the cold, as President Donald Trump helps him emerge from years of isolation

media:content.media:text: Belarusian President Alexander Lukashenko; U.S. President Donald Trump
media:content.media:description: Belarusian President Alexander Lukashenko; U.S. President Donald Trump

media:content.media:text: Russian President Vladimir Putin and Belarussian President Alexander Lukashenko play Ice Hockey in Sochi
media:content.media:description: Lukashenko attends an ice hockey match at Galaktika center in Sochi, Russia, in 2020.

media:content.media:text: TOPSHOT-BELARUS-POLITICS-UNREST-DEMO
media:content.media:description: Law enforcement officers detain demonstrators during a rally in Minsk in 2020 to protest against the Belarus presidential election results.

media:content.media:credit: President of the Republic of Belarus
media:content.media:text: Lukashenko visits a dairy farm in Belarus' Orsha district in 2021.
media:content.media:description: Lukashenko visits a dairy farm in Belarus' Orsha district in 2021.

media:content.media:text: Released political prisoners arrive in Vilnius after a prisoner release from Belarus on March 19.
media:content.media:description: Released political prisoners arrive in Vilnius after a prisoner release from Belarus on March 19.

media:content.media:text: Belarus US
media:content.media:description: Lukashenko, right, and U.S. presidential envoy John Coale shake hands during their meeting in Minsk, Belarus, in December 2025.

item.title: Trump defrosts relations with Europe’s last dictator, Alexander Lukashenko

item.dc:creator: Freddie Clayton
Nat Sumon
item.description: Five men have now been freed after spending more than a week trapped in a flooded cave in Laos, according to rescuers, with two others still missing

media:content.media:text: Rescuers pull four from flooded cave in Laos
media:content.media:description: Rescued men are welcomed, after seven Lao nationals who had entered a cave to prospect for gold were trapped for more than a week when rising water blocked their exit, in Xaisomboun province, Laos, May 30, 2026, in this screen grab taken from social media video.

item.title: Four more men rescued from flooded cave after becoming trapped while searching for gold

item.dc:creator: Jeremy Mikula
Joe Murphy
item.description: Another incumbent is defeated in a primary, the pope releases his first encyclical, and the New York Knicks turn back the clock.
item.title: A CIA officer’s alleged heist, and a buffalo’s uncanny likeness to a famous American: The news quiz

item.dc:creator: Adam Edelman
item.description: A trio of former Biden White House officials running for governor in 2026 are striking a delicate balance, pointing to their experience in the administration without leaning too aggressively into their connection to a former president still facing a raft of bad headlines

media:content.media:text: Keisha Lance Bottoms, Deb Haaland and Xavier Becerra.
media:content.media:description: Keisha Lance Bottoms; Deb Haaland; and Xavier Becerra.

item.title: How three governor candidates highlight White House experience but rarely mention Biden

item.dc:creator: Joe Kottke
Bella LoBue
item.description: A United flight bound for Minneapolis diverted to Wisconsin on Friday night after reports of an unruly passenger, officials said

media:content.media:text: United Airlines At San Diego International Airport
media:content.media:description: A United Airlines Boeing 737 MAX 8 airplane taxis at San Diego International Airport on May 27, 2026 in San Diego, California.

item.title: United Airlines plane diverted and ‘unruly passenger’ detained after in-flight incident

item.dc:creator: Bianca Alvarez
item.description: Bar soaps work as effectively as body washes and I rounded up editor-approved picks from Dove, L’Occitane, Avène and more.

media:content.media:text: Yes, they clean your skin, but they can also combat acne, dryness and uneven texture.
media:content.media:description: Yes, they clean your skin, but they can also combat acne, dryness and uneven texture.

media:content.media:text: Yes, they clean your skin, but they can also combat acne, dryness and uneven texture.
media:content.media:description: Yes, they clean your skin, but they can also combat acne, dryness and uneven texture.

item.title: Bar soaps vs. body wash — which is best for your skin?

item.dc:creator: Cory Fernandez
Cory Fernandez
Bethany Heitman
item.description: I found the best methods and products for cleaning glasses, including reading glasses, sunglasses and more. Optometrists recommend the best cleaning products.

media:content.media:text: A microfiber cloth is one of the best options for cleaning glasses since it won’t leave streaks.
media:content.media:description: A microfiber cloth is one of the best options for cleaning glasses since it won’t leave streaks.

media:content.media:text: A microfiber cloth is one of the best options for cleaning glasses since it won’t leave streaks.
media:content.media:description: A microfiber cloth is one of the best options for cleaning glasses since it won’t leave streaks.

item.title: This is how you should actually be cleaning your glasses

item.dc:creator: Bethany Heitman
item.description: Sandals are notoriously not great for lots of walking. These podiatrists-approved sandals have built-in arch support and cushioning to keep you comfortable.

media:content.media:text: According to podiatrists, the key to a comfy sandal is built-in arch support and thick, secure straps.
media:content.media:description: According to podiatrists, the key to a comfy sandal is built-in arch support and thick, secure straps.

media:content.media:text: According to podiatrists, the key to a comfy sandal is built-in arch support and thick, secure straps.
media:content.media:description: According to podiatrists, the key to a comfy sandal is built-in arch support and thick, secure straps.

item.title: 6 podiatrist-approved sandals to comfortably walk in all summer

item.dc:creator: Cory Fernandez
item.description: Walmart’s Outdoor Flash Sale is here and has grill accessories, outdoor furniture, lawn appliances and more for up to 65 percent off.

media:content.media:text: Walmart’s Flash Sale usually only lasts for a few days, so it’s best to get ahead on deals now.
media:content.media:description: Walmart’s Flash Sale usually only lasts for a few days, so it’s best to get ahead on deals now.

media:content.media:text: Walmart’s Flash Sale usually only lasts for a few days, so it’s best to get ahead on deals now.
media:content.media:description: Walmart’s Flash Sale usually only lasts for a few days, so it’s best to get ahead on deals now.

item.title: Flash sale: Get up to 65% off grill tools and more outdoor items at Walmart for a limited time
